era_context: Early Iron Age II. Ashurnasirpal II continues his reign in Assyria. Egypt's Twenty-first Dynasty remains weak and fragmented. Greece is in the Geometric period. The Zhou Dynasty in China is in decline. The Vedic period continues in South Asia.
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified. No specific events are documented for this year.
historiographic_note: 893 BCE has no known specific documented events in surviving historical records. Like 892 BCE, this year falls within a period where written documentation is sparse or non-existent for most of the world. Even for Mesopotamia, the most well-documented region of this era, year-by-year precision is not available. The historical record for this year is negligible.
